title: limnanthes alba subsp. alba
intro: Limnanthes alba subsp. alba, also known as meadowfoam, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Limnanthaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Pacific coast of North America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin irritations and wounds. The plant contains compounds like limnanthin, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing benefits for skin health and wound healing. Traditionally, meadowfoam is used in herbal preparations, such as salves and creams, to soothe and protect the skin, making it a popular ingredient in natural skincare products.
